data.title: Bitcoin's largest crash since 2021 leads to $2.3B loss, as short-term holders sell at steep declines in record event.
data.description: Bitcoin recently experienced its highest-ever realized losses during a significant capitulation event within the cryptocurrency market. Short-term holders were observed selling at substantial losses during Bitcoin’s decline.

data.title: Dott and Segway partner for green mobility at Milan Winter Events 2026, using shared e-bike model.
data.description: Today in Milan, the 2026 events have kicked off, with Segway, a prominent company in personal mobility and service robotics, announcing its collaboration with Dott, the top shared micromobility operator in Europe. Segway will provide Dott with its shared e-bike model to enhance their services during the event.

data.title: OKYO Pharma prices $20M public offering with 10,815,000 shares at $1.85/share, with option for additional 1,622,250 shares.
data.description: Today, OKYO Pharma Limited (Nasdaq: OKYO) revealed the details of their recent underwritten public offering in London and New York on February 12, 2026. The clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focusing on therapies for neuropathic corneal pain (NCP) and inflammatory eye diseases, set the pricing at $1.85 per ordinary share. The Offering consisted of 10,815,000 ordinary shares, with an additional option for the underwriter to buy up to 1,622,250 more shares within 30 days at the same price, exclusive of underwriting fees.

data.title: NUBURU announces $12M public offering to boost Defense & Security plan execution.
data.description: DENVER-- NUBURU, Inc. revealed the pricing of its $12 million public offering as part of its Defense & Security Transformation Plan. NUBURU, traded on NYSE American under BURU, specializes in non-kinetic effects, directed-energy technologies, and software-orchestrated defense systems. The aim of this financing is to speed up the company's plan execution within the Defense & Security sector and enhance its financial standing while progressing its integrated platform strategy.

data.title: HTX sees 25.6% volume growth, adds 20+ ramps with 58 million users in January 2026.
data.description: In February 12, 2026, in Panama City, a new phase kicks off in the global cryptocurrency market as increased volatility and liquidity shifts characterize the scene. By late January of the same year, HTX achieved a remarkable feat of acquiring 58 million registered users. Simultaneously, trading volume also experienced significant growth, reaching noteworthy levels.

data.title: Alkane Resources reports record Q2 & H1 FY2026 results, both operating and financial.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the national unemployment rate has dropped to its lowest level in five years. The rate now stands at 3.8%, a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. This positive trend in job availability has led to a decrease in the number of individuals seeking unemployment benefits. The number of new benefit claims has decreased by 15% in the past month, indicating a strengthening job market. Additionally, the economy has added 250,000 new jobs in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and fueling further optimism about the future outlook of the labor market.

data.title: PABCO Roofing and Kitsap Roofing partner for local domestic violence program with a roof replacement. Gig Harbor, Feb 6, 2026.
data.description: In an effort to provide assistance to a local domestic violence program, PABCO Roofing Products has partnered with Kitsap Roofing in Gig Harbor, Washington. The collaboration aims to offer a roof replacement for the program, ensuring the safety and protection of families in need. The press release was updated on February 6, 2026, and further details can be found in the provided links.

data.title: Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. reports Q4 2025 results, prepared in Soles (S/). Leading cement company in Peru.
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. and its subsidiaries (NYSE: CPAC; BVL: CPACASC1), a prominent cement provider to the Peruvian construction sector, have disclosed their consolidated outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2025 ("4Q25") and for the full year ending December 31, 2025 ("2025"). The results, following International Financial Reporting Standards ("IFRS") and denominated in Soles (S/), showcase the Company's financial and operational performance in 4Q25.
